name: malloc-free-scaffold-v2
description: Scaffolds free(...) for direct allocations and for caller-owned helper functions that return allocated memory.

commands.title: Malloc Free Scaffold: Refresh Current Document

mallocFreeScaffold.enabled.description: Enable automatic cleanup scaffolding for C/C++.

mallocFreeScaffold.detectOwnedReturnFunc.description: Detect helper functions that allocate and return owned memory, then scaffold free(...) at call sites instead of inside the helper.

mallocFreeScaffold.allocatorFunctions.description: Function names treated as allocation sources.

mallocFreeScaffold.cleanupFunctionName.description: Cleanup function inserted for owned heap memory.
